notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to , The Public Health and Welfare, prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 13941 of Title 42

children.heading: Training programs
children.label: b Training programs
children.text: The Attorney General shall ensure, to the extent practicable, that training programs developed under subsection (a) are available in geographically diverse locations throughout the country.

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations
children.label: c Authorization of appropriations
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated to carry out this section $5,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2023 through 2027.
